_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and review recruiting, hiring, and retention procedures in accordance with current Human Resource (HR) policies.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-009 (LS, cosine: 0.480), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.388).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.358). Shared vocabulary: [current]. DCWF-only terms [accordance, develop, hiring, hr, human, policies] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.875, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (94.1%). "Develop and review recruiting, hiring, and retention procedures in accordance wi" and "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 > STS 0.358 (gap +0.131). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [current] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [current]. DCWF-only: [accordance, develop, hiring, hr, human, policies]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, data].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.131 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
